<!-- Thank you for contributing to Axiom-PMO. Please complete this checklist. -->

## What does this change do?

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Validation rule (new or modified)
- [ ] Policy / config change (`pmo-config/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / scripts
- [ ] Interoperability / integrations
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] **Negative fixture** added for any new/changed rule
- [ ] Golden output reviewed, and any diff explained in this PR
- [ ] **No validation weakening** (or: an explicit, justified policy decision is described below)
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior or config changed
- [ ] **No private data** (local paths, personal handles, secrets, customer material)
- [ ] **No unauthorized generated evidence** (no fabricated test/CI/approval results)
- [ ] Interoperability / compatibility considered where relevant
- [ ] AI-assisted changes are **disclosed and human-reviewed** (see below)

## Governance impact

<!-- If this changes a rule's severity, a policy, an approval gate, or git authority,
explain what changed and why it does not reduce governance strictness. Write "none" if
not applicable. -->

## AI assistance disclosure

<!-- Was any part of this change AI-generated or AI-assisted? If so, which parts, and
confirm a human reviewed them. Write "none" if not applicable. -->
